actions.name: update
actions.script:
IF self.level > 0 THEN
  SET self.flow.present = true
ELSE
  SET self.flow.present = false
END
IF self.level <= self.low_threshold THEN
  SET self.level_low = true
ELSE
  SET self.level_low = false
END
IF self.level >= self.high_threshold THEN
  SET self.level_high = true
ELSE
  SET self.level_high = false
END

actions.name: tick
actions.script:
IF self.receiving THEN
  SET self.level = MIN(self.level + 25, 100)
  CALL self.update
END

listeners.script:
SET self.receiving = true
SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
SET self.flow.fluid_type = SUP(0).flow.fluid_type

faults.name: tank_leak
faults.description: Broken tank receiving fluid — close inlet and drain.

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.fluid_type = ""

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.broken THEN
  RETURN
END
IF self.running THEN
  SET self.running = false
  CALL self.clear_flow
ELSE
  IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
    SET self.running = true
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = true
    SET self.flow.rate = 100
    SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
    SET self.flow.fluid_type = SUP(0).flow.fluid_type
  ELSE
    ARM dry_run
    SET self.broken = true
  END
END

listeners.script:
IF self.running THEN
  ARM dry_run
  SET self.broken = true
  SET self.running = false
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

SET self.flow.present = true
SET self.flow.flowing = true
SET self.flow.rate = 100
SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
SET self.flow.fluid_type = SUP(0).flow.fluid_type

ARM dead_head
SET self.broken = true
SET self.running = false
CALL self.clear_flow

faults.name: dry_run
faults.description: Pump running without upstream fluid supply.

faults.name: dead_head
faults.description: Pump running against a closed outlet.

faults.name: broken_flow
faults.description: Fluid present at a seized pump — isolate upstream immediately.

actions.name: copy_upstream
actions.script:
SET self.flow.flowing = true
SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
SET self.flow.fluid_type = SUP(0).flow.fluid_type

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.fluid_type = ""

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.open THEN
  SET self.open = false
ELSE
  SET self.open = true
END
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF self.open THEN
  IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
    CALL self.copy_upstream
  ELSE
    CALL self.clear_flow
  END
  IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

listeners.script:
SET ALLSUP.blocked = true
SET self.blocked = true

SET ALLSUP.blocked = false
SET self.blocked = false

SET ALLSUP.blocked = true
SET self.blocked = true

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.fluid_type = ""

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.open THEN
  SET self.open = false
ELSE
  SET self.open = true
END
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF self.open AND self.opening > 0 THEN
  IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
    SET self.flow.flowing = true
    SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate * self.opening / 100
    SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
    SET self.flow.fluid_type = SUP(0).flow.fluid_type
  ELSE
    CALL self.clear_flow
  END
  IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

actions.name: copy_upstream
actions.script:
SET self.flow.flowing = true
SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
SET self.flow.fluid_type = SUP(0).flow.fluid_type

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.fluid_type = ""

actions.name: update_opening
actions.script:
IF self.powered THEN
  SET self.opening = self.signal
ELSE
  IF self.fail_open THEN
    SET self.opening = 100
  ELSE
    SET self.opening = 0
  END
END
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF self.opening > 0 THEN
  IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
    SET self.flow.flowing = true
    SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate * self.opening / 100
    SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
    SET self.flow.fluid_type = SUP(0).flow.fluid_type
  ELSE
    CALL self.clear_flow
  END
  IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

actions.name: copy_upstream
actions.script:
SET self.flow.flowing = true
SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
SET self.flow.fluid_type = SUP(0).flow.fluid_type

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.fluid_type = ""
SET self.pressure_drop = 0
SET self.flow_pulse = false
DEFAULT_SKIN SELF

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
  IF self.blocked THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = false
    SET self.flow.rate = 0
    SET self.flow.fluid_type = ""
    SET self.pressure_drop = 0
    SET self.flow_pulse = false
    DEFAULT_SKIN SELF
  ELSE
    SET self.flow.present = true
    CALL self.copy_upstream
    SET self.pressure_drop = self.resistance * self.flow.rate ^ 2 + 9810 * self.elevation_change
    SET self.flow_pulse = true
    SET_SKIN SELF "flowing"
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_flow
  IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
  END
END

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.heating = false
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.fluid_type = ""

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.broken AND self.active == false THEN
  RETURN
END
IF self.active THEN
  SET self.active = false
  SET self.heating = false
  SET self.flow.temperature = 20
  ELSE
  IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
    SET self.active = true
      ELSE
    ARM dry_run
  END
END
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
  SET self.flow.present = true
  SET self.flow.flowing = true
  SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
  SET self.flow.fluid_type = SUP(0).flow.fluid_type
  IF self.active THEN
    SET self.heating = true
    SET self.flow.temperature = 80
  ELSE
    SET self.heating = false
    SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_flow
  IF self.active THEN
    ARM dry_run
    SET self.broken = true
  END
END

listeners.script:
CALL self.clear_flow
IF self.active THEN
  ARM dry_run
  SET self.broken = true
END

faults.name: dry_run
faults.description: Heater active without fluid flowing through it.

faults.name: heater_electrical
faults.description: Broken heater element energised — deactivate immediately.

componentSets.name: Plant Boundary Components
componentSets.description: Theoretical entry and exit points â€” not operator-controllable.

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.receiving = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.fluid_type = ""

listeners.script:
SET self.flow.present = true
SET self.flow.flowing = true
SET self.receiving = true
SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
SET self.flow.fluid_type = SUP(0).flow.fluid_type

componentSets.name: Specialist Process Components
componentSets.description: Components requiring more complex wiring conventions.

actions.name: update_process_side
actions.script:
IF SUP(0).flow.flowing THEN
  SET self.process_flowing = true
  SET self.process_temp_in = SUP(0).flow.temperature
  SET self.process_fluid_type = SUP(0).flow.fluid_type
ELSE
  SET self.process_flowing = false
  SET self.process_fluid_type = ""
END

actions.name: update_service_side
actions.script:
IF SUP(1).flow.flowing THEN
  SET self.service_flowing = true
  SET self.service_temp_in = SUP(1).flow.temperature
  SET self.service_fluid_type = SUP(1).flow.fluid_type
ELSE
  SET self.service_flowing = false
  SET self.service_fluid_type = ""
END

actions.name: update_heat_transfer
actions.script:
IF self.process_flowing AND self.service_flowing THEN
  SET self.heat_transfer_active = true
  SET self.process_temp_out = 80
  SET self.service_temp_out = 40
ELSE
  SET self.heat_transfer_active = false
  SET self.process_temp_out = self.process_temp_in
  IF self.service_flowing THEN
    SET self.service_temp_out = self.service_temp_in
  ELSE
    SET self.service_temp_out = 20
  END
END

actions.name: update_ports
actions.script:
IF self.process_flowing THEN
  SET self.process_out.present = true
  SET self.process_out.flowing = true
  SET self.process_out.rate = SUP(0).flow.rate
  SET self.process_out.temperature = self.process_temp_out
  SET self.process_out.fluid_type = self.process_fluid_type
ELSE
  SET self.process_out.present = false
  SET self.process_out.flowing = false
  SET self.process_out.rate = 0
  SET self.process_out.temperature = 20
  SET self.process_out.fluid_type = ""
END
IF self.service_flowing THEN
  SET self.service_out.present = true
  SET self.service_out.flowing = true
  SET self.service_out.rate = SUP(1).flow.rate
  SET self.service_out.temperature = self.service_temp_out
  SET self.service_out.fluid_type = self.service_fluid_type
ELSE
  SET self.service_out.present = false
  SET self.service_out.flowing = false
  SET self.service_out.rate = 0
  SET self.service_out.temperature = 20
  SET self.service_out.fluid_type = ""
END

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
CALL self.update_process_side
CALL self.update_service_side
CALL self.update_heat_transfer
CALL self.update_ports

listeners.script:
SET self.process_blocked = true
SET self.blocked = true
SET SUP(0).blocked = true

SET self.process_blocked = false
IF self.service_blocked THEN
  SET self.blocked = true
ELSE
  SET self.blocked = false
END
SET SUP(0).blocked = false

SET self.service_blocked = true
SET self.blocked = true
SET SUP(1).blocked = true

SET self.service_blocked = false
IF self.process_blocked THEN
  SET self.blocked = true
ELSE
  SET self.blocked = false
END
SET SUP(1).blocked = false

faults.name: he_fault
faults.description: Heat exchanger operating in fault condition.

componentSets.name: Electrical Components
componentSets.description: Stub electrical components. Full suite (wiring, loads, protection) to follow.

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.energised THEN
  SET self.energised = false
ELSE
  SET self.energised = true
END
